dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the pursuit is not over. Your efforts to {quest_action} led us to a dead end, but {quest_ally} found new signs.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} doubled back toward {quest_focus}. The {enemy_type} are providing cover, and they have been massing {location_hint}. We need to push through them to pick up the trail again.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes} cannot wait. If we lose the trail now, we lose everything.

playerResponses.text: Then we push through. I am not giving up.
The trail is cold. It is time to move on.

dialogueChunks.intro: Bad news, {player_name}. While you were working to {quest_action}, {quest_threat} set a trap near {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} nearly walked into it. The {enemy_type} have fortified the area {location_hint}. We need to clear them out and recover any {quest_item} they have taken as proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: They are trying to discourage us. Let us show them it will not work.

playerResponses.text: Traps will not stop me. Where are they?
They are getting desperate. Good. So am I.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I was wrong about how far {quest_threat} would go. Since you started to {quest_action}, they have lashed out at {quest_stakes} directly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It is personal now. {quest_ally} confirmed that {enemy_type} were sent to {quest_focus} as a distraction while the real target fled {location_hint}. We need to deal with both threats.
dialogueChunks.outro: End this pursuit once and for all. I am counting on you.

playerResponses.text: They made this personal. I will finish it.
Two targets? This had better come with a bonus.
This is spiraling out of control. I am done.
